name: MSI PRO H610M-G WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR5-5600 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 1x M.2 Slot - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - DisplayPort 1.4 - VGA - HDMI 2.1 - Intel GbE LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3 (PROH610MGWIFI)
shortName: MSI PRO H610M-G WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Entry-level Intel Micro-ATX motherboard with LGA 1700 socket, H610 chipset, and Wi-Fi 6E connectivity.
